shows.name: Unc's Polyjam
shows.desc: Jam with your cool uncle that appears at family events always had the coolest soundtracks, at least according to him. Join me for the next hour and lets jam out to every sort of sound on this good earth.

shows.desc: Join me as I yap about all things otome isekai, from red flag MLs to rating the worst villainesses to diamonds in the rough.

shows.name: The Groove
shows.desc: A showcase and representation of club dance music focusing on house and techno. Come explore the deep grooves that people have been dancing to for the past 5 decades, uniting people across all cultures.

shows.desc: The Hyperfixationers are back and better than ever for their third semester. Join us once again as we discuss whatever has been plaguing our thoughts recently
